sections.paragraph:
Original: קוּם

Transliteration: qûm

Phonetic: koom

BDB Definition:

  1. to arise, stand
    1. (Peal)
      1. to arise from
      2. to come on the scene (figuratively)
      3. to arise (out of inaction)
      4. to stand
      5. to endure
    2. (Pael) to set up, establish
    3. (Aphel)
      1. to set up
      2. to lift up
      3. to establish
      4. to appoint
    4. (Hophal) to be made to stand

Origin: corresponding to H6965

TWOT entry: 2968

Part(s) of speech: Verb
